node.ratingTags: Amazing lectures --Gives good feedback--Accessible outside class

node.comment: Really fantastic guy, super clear with work and class expectations, always willing to help outside class

If you can take a class with Max, do it. He scares me sometimes but he is no doubt a great teacher. He has a good amount of office hours and helps out quickly and efficiently. Makes CS231 hard, but fair and rewarding.

Awesome professor! Lectures are great, and even though the course content can be difficult and the class moves really fast, he makes everything flow seamlessly. Very accessible outside of class, including online in a well-used and efficient Discord server. Office hours can become very busy but manages to give good feedback to everyone.
Bender might be the best professor at Colby. Very smart and his lectures are very interesting. Holds lots of office hours outside of class, even on Sundays when projects are due.
